entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop Pennisetum glaucum used for food and fodder

entities.name: LINE 843B
entities.description: A pearl millet parental line developed through 9 generations of pedigree selection and backcrossing

entities.name: LINE 843A
entities.description: A pearl millet parental line derived by backcrossing PI185642 and Tift23D2A1

entities.name: TIFT23D2B1
entities.description: A pearl millet line used as a parent in the development of line 843B

entities.name: PI185542
entities.description: A pearl millet line used as a parent in the development of line 843B

entities.name: PI185642
entities.description: A pearl millet line used as a parent in the development of line 843A

entities.name: TIFT23D2A1
entities.description: A pearl millet line used as a parent in the development of line 843A

entities.name: HHB67
entities.description: An early-maturing hybrid of pearl millet for which line 843A is the seed parent

entities.name: PEDIGREE SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method involving the selection of individuals based on their ancestry over multiple generations

entities.name: BACKCROSSING
entities.description: A breeding method where a hybrid is crossed with one of its parents to incorporate specific traits

entities.name: DWARFISM
entities.description: A trait characterized by short stature, specifically the d2 dwarf phenotype

entities.name: EARLY FLOWERING
entities.description: A trait where 50% flowering is achieved in an average of 42 days

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The geographic location where the flowering time of the lines was observed

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The environmental condition or season during which the flowering time was recorded

entities.name: PANICLE SHAPE
entities.description: A trait describing the physical form of the panicles, specifically candle-shaped

entities.name: GRAIN WEIGHT
entities.description: A trait measuring the mass of the grains, specifically 11-12 g per 1000 grains

entities.name: GRAIN COLOUR
entities.description: A trait describing the color of the grains, specifically grey

entities.name: EARLY MATURITY
entities.description: A trait characterized by a shorter growth cycle before reaching maturity
